Package com.github.query4j.examples.model

Class User

java.lang.Object
com.github.query4j.examples.model.User
public class User extends Object
Example User entity for Query4j documentation and examples. This class represents a typical JPA entity that would be used with the Query4j Dynamic Query Builder.
